text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph... Not bad. I bet it's all thanks to my magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, though, you should be able to handle
simple missions like this without my help.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But I suppose you did try your best. You deserve
some praise.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
As thanks, I'll give up the idea of passing off my
worries and just decorate my room. Keep up the
good work, Familiar!
